# UC-10.17.3 · SonicWall Content Filtering Service Blocks by Category (SonicWall)

## Description

CFS blocks are primary evidence of acceptable-use enforcement. Category trending reveals shadow IT, compromised clients, or policy drift.

## Value

Improves HR/legal alignment on web policy and speeds investigations into malware C2 categories.

## Implementation

Map vendor category integers to human-readable names via lookup `sonicwall_cfs_categories.csv`.

## SPL

```spl
index=netfw sourcetype="dell:sonicwall:firewall" earliest=-7d
| where match(lower(fw_action),"(?i)block|deny") AND match(lower(_raw),"(?i)cfs|category|web")
| stats count by cat, usr, src_ip
| sort -count
| head 50
```

## Visualization

Stacked bar (categories over time), table (user, category, URL host).

## References

- [Splunkbase — Dell SonicWall Add-on for Splunk](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/6203)
- [Splunk Connect for Syslog — Dell SonicWall reference](https://docs.splunk.com/Documentation/SC4S/latest/)
